programme.desc: Don Fertman, the Chief Development Officer for SUBWAY restaurants, one of the world's largest food franchises, goes undercover where he learns endless sandwich combinations while being trained by one of the toughest, no-nonsense employees ever.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Henrik Slipsager, President and CEO of ABM Industries, one of the nation's largest facilities services contractors, offering janitorial, engineering, parking and security services for thousands of clients, takes a journey within his own corporation.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: John Fuller, President and CEO of Johnny Rockets, one of the nation's largest chains of retro-themed restaurants, goes undercover to work in a restaurant for the first time in his career.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Kevin Sheehan, President and CEO of Norwegian Cruise Line, finds himself in uncharted territory when he's asked to lead nearly 1,000 party-goers in a line dance, and is later forced to reveal his true identity after being recognized by an employee.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Ronald Croatti, President and CEO of UniFirst, one of the nation's largest producers of workwear and uniforms, dons a "hippie" look during his undercover mission, where he finds himself struggling to keep pace with the fast-moving assembly line.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Sheldon Yellen, the CEO of BELFOR, the world's largest disaster restoration company, goes undercover and becomes frustrated while struggling to hang drywall. Also, the boss unexpectedly reveals himself while working alongside an employee.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Denny Slagle, President and CEO of Mack Trucks, the second largest manufacturer of heavy-duty trucks in the world, goes undercover and brings the plant's assembly line to a halt, and hears rumors that Mack is moving its operations to Mexico.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The mayor of Cincinnati, Mark Mallory, becomes the first elected official to go undercover as a municipal employee, working as a mechanic repairing public transportation vehicles and a sanitation worker.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Rich McClure, CEO of United Van Lines, the nation's largest moving company, asks his wife to assist him during one of his undercover jobs. And the boss' moving team fears he won't make it through the physically demanding process of an entire move.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Scott Sibella, President and COO of the MGM Grand in Las Vegas, goes undercover within the walls of the second-largest hotel in the world and faces a group of rowdy gamblers who are quick to point out his shortcomings as a dealer.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Bill Massa, President and CEO of Synagro, the nation's largest waste water treatment corporation, goes undercover in the series' dirtiest mission to date and finds himself cleaning a tank of 27-year-old sludge.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In this Season 9 wrap-up special, Tim Gunn reveals some of the show’s biggest secrets.

programme.desc: The composer of Wicked challenges All Stars to design an outfit for the Broadway musical Godspell.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: At the UN headquarters, the All Stars to choose flags as inspiration for beautiful dresses.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: The remaining All Stars use lighting technology to create an avant-garde design.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars
programme.desc: To determine who makes it to the finale, the designers get a lesson in the business of fashion.

programme.title: Project Runway All Stars

programme.desc: Bea warns Kathy about Terry's intentions. Erica attempts to help Lizzie and Sid.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 50

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 54
programme.desc: Alison is upset and confused, and Vera goes for an interview.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 55

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 56

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 59

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 62
programme.desc: Jim offers no reason for his resignation, and Powell's promotion may be jeopardy.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 63
programme.desc: Peter tells the women he's on the run. Doreen sees this as a chance to go on the pull!

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 66
programme.desc: Doreen and Peter risk capture to take Martin to hospital. Erica is taken hostage.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 68

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S3 Ep. 72

programme.title: Accused S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Peter Cartwright engages Charlotte, a nurse, to tend his dying wife Katherine. Several months after Katherine's death, he begins to date Charlotte, eventually marrying her.

programme.title: Accused S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Stephen Cartwright begins his sentence at an understaffed young offender unit. His wing officer, Tina Dakin, is concerned at his withdrawn attitude and attempts to prevent him from killing himself.

programme.title: Accused S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After a row with a drunken bigot, crossdresser Simon gets into a taxi with Tony Baines. Tony is fascinated by Simon's alter ego Tracie and the two begin an affair.

programme.title: Accused S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Plumber Willy Houlihan is all set to leave his wife and three children for his girlfriend Michelle when his daughter Laura announces her forthcoming wedding.

programme.title: Raw S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Jojo and Bobby get a rude awakening when the Garda come looking for their flat mate Eddie, who is suspected of dealing drugs.

programme.title: Raw S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A mysterious newcomer appears to re-open Raw and reunite the old team. But will her plans be thwarted at the last minute?

programme.title: Raw S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Fiona and Geoff use all of their savings to refurbish Raw — a high-risk strategy in Ireland's tough economic climate. Opening night is a success but a sudden robbery occurs.

programme.title: Raw S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Fiona is upbeat on her 40th birthday, until the gang receives news that the Raw building is to be sold.

programme.title: Raw S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Everyone is surprised when Jojo returns to Raw with a ring on her finger and a new husband in tow.

programme.title: Raw S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Jojo is looking forward to Eddie's homecoming party — and more specifically, to drinking enough to forget about Bobby flirting with Rebecca.

programme.title: Raw S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Shane and Jojo's domestic bliss is wrecked by an unexpected visit from their mother, Maeve. She in turn gets a nasty shock when Shane's arrest is revealed.

programme.title: Raw S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Kate rebuffs Shane's morning-after advances, Maeve prepares for her first day at Trinity College and the Raw staff seeks to recover from the robbery.

programme.title: Raw S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When they return home to find the flat wrecked by Jojo's impromptu house party, Kate tells Shane it's high time his sister moved out.

programme.title: Raw S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Anthony is offered a job that conflicts with Jojo’s position at Raw. Kate bristles at Shane and Zoe's budding relationship and Fiona realizes that there is more to Max.

programme.title: Raw S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tanya's husband Mal goes back to his old ways and Geoff threatens to leave unless he gets a raise.

programme.title: Raw S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The whole restaurant is in shock when a customer suddenly falls ill. Meanwhile, Fiona's past catches up to her and Cupid's bow threatens to strike Jojo.

programme.title: Raw S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Wracked with guilt since she slept with Bobby, Jojo must choose between him and Dylan. Meanwhile, Shane struggles to cope with his parents' separation and Pavel's romance.

programme.title: Raw S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: With Jojo suffering a raging hangover and Fiona gone from the restaurant, it's up to Geoff to keep the show on the road.

programme.title: Raw S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: As Kate prepares for the opening of her pop-up shop, Jojo has second thoughts about walking out on Raw for her dream honeymoon.

programme.title: Raw S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Shane has to make some hard choices when his wife finally tracks him down. Meanwhile, an old rival provides an unlikely answer to Tanya and Mal's problems.

programme.title: Raw S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Pavel delivers devastating news to Geoff. Meanwhile, Jojo discovers Dylan's secret past.

programme.title: Raw S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jojo and Dylan enjoy their new status as an engaged couple, but Maeve nearly pushes Jojo over the edge while pressing her to plan a traditional white wedding.

programme.title: Raw S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jojo finds it tough to put mistakes behind her while enduring Kate's jibes, Maeve's concerns and Geoff's favoritism towards his new protégé.

programme.title: Raw S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Fiona is thrilled by Geoff's return, but is surprised when Geoff chooses to keep Max at the restaurant.

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass and Wildboyz star Chris Pontius joins Rob, Chanel, and Sterling get up close in some "All-Natural Weirdness," dance with some "Party Boys,"

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Waka Flocka Flame joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to consider hiring some QUALIFIED ROLLERS, marvel at people who use NO HANDS, and laugh at CRAPTICAL JOKERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 8
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by rapper G-Eazy to learn the DANGERS OF ALONE TIME, get a taste of the riches in THE ALMOST GOOD LIFE, and experience the heartbreak of being SERVED A CURVE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 713
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, it's Sterling's time to shine as Rob quizzes him with a "Steelo Vision Test," the gang gets some "Trill Advice" and do all they can to avoid "The Brim Reaper."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 11

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 12

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy Award-winning duo The Chainsmokers join Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to cringe at some BITERS, ride STOLEN MATTRESSES and marvel at the magic of real-life TELEPORTERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 16

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling have NASCAR's Chase Elliott talk about "Hall Of Fame Dads," suffer a "Victory Lapse," and get a helping hand from some "Personal Pit Crews."

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob welcomes WWE Diva, Paige, to learn what it's like to be "Born Badass," watch some "Everyday Divas" throwdown and learn there's no better insults than some "Proper Smack."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 707

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, talkshow host Steve Wilkos joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to check out some SURPRISE TITTIES, call STEVECURITY and watch the HIGHEST RATED CATEGORY EVER.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 816
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling enjoy some "White Whines", attend an "Animals Anonymous" meeting and take a trip to the most dangerous suburb in the country "Slamburbia."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 829
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, stunt person and Nitro Circus star Jolene Van Vugt stops by to get destructive with "Smash Happy," capture the perfect monkey moments in "Right Place, Right Monkey,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 29
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Post Malone joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to ball with some REALLY WHITE IVERSONS, get messy with the category SAUCIN' ON YOU and show off some KNUCKLE TATS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 719

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 819

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 802

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 709
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, model and actress Charlotte Mckinney joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to tell some "Dirty Secrets", taste some "All Natural Beef" and clench for the category "Spike My Butt".

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Nitro Circus stuntman, Andy Bell joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to take a look at some "Nitro Sideshows," take a look at the phenomenon of "Street Prancing,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 830
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling discuss the drunk ingenuity of "Drinkovators", explore the bizarre "Planet Of The Vapes" and test their palates for destruction in the "Taste Of Death".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob welcomes NFL superstar Rob Gronkowski to learn what it's like to be "Unwakeable," the dangers of being "Bus Blind" and experience the strange aggression of "Mild Boys."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 814
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel go "Flame Dumb," test out their hand skills in "Snatch Masters," and slow-mo man's best friend in "Goooooooddddd Boooooooyyyyy."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 722
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined by rapper and reality TV star Ja Rule to "Keep It On The Green," run in terror from "Ja Ghouls" and be driven crazy by "These Damn Kids!"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 823

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo get jammed up in STUCK MY LIFE, take their chances in GATOR GAMBLIN' and enlist in the GRAVY SEALS.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cartman's Silly Hate Crime: Things go from bad to worse for Cartman after he throws a rock at Token - it's jail time for this racist! Will the boys win the sled race without lardy on board? (S4, E02)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Timmy! 2000: The boys copy Timmy's behaviour (who has ADD) in order to get out of doing homework. Timmy is heading for rock stardom - but not if Phil Collins has anything to do with it! (S4, E03)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Cartman Joins NAMBLA: Cartman joins The North American Man Boy Love Association but does he know what they really want? Meanwhile, Kenny will do anything to stop his parents having a kid. (S4, E05)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Cherokee Hair Tampons: When Kyle falls ill his mum goes to Miss Information's holistic medicine store - can herbs supplied by 2 "native" Americans really help? Guest stars Cheech and Chong. (S4, E06)

programme.desc: Chef's passionate protest declaring the South Park flag racist enflames the entire town.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Something You Can Do With Your Finger: Cartman is convinced that his dream is a sign from God, so corrals the boys into making a boyband called "Fingerbang". He's not happy when Wendy joins! (S4, E08)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Do The Handicapped Go To Hell? The boys are convinced they will go to hell when they die unless they confess all their sins. Satan is torn between two lovers: Chris and Saddam Hussein.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Probably: The boys build a church-shaped shack to live in and listen to Cartman the preacher man. Meanwhile, Satan turns to an unlikely source for advice about his relationship woes.

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: 4th Grade: The boys enter the 4th grade and take a fast dislike to their new teacher, Ms Choksondik. Meanwhile, Mr Garrison realises he needs to acknowledge and confront his "gay side". (S4, E11)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Trapper Keeper: Cartman is none too happy when 'Bill Cosby' tells him his ultra-advanced Trapper Keeper 2000 is destined to become sentient and wipe out humanity. That kinda sucks ay? (S4, E12)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Helen Keller! The Musical: The boys stage a Thanksgiving play about the life of author Helen Keller, starring Timmy as Helen. There's trouble involving his favourite turkey, Gobbles. (S4, E13)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Fat Camp: Cartman is sent to fat camp in order to resolve his weight problem but all is not as it seems when he returns skinny. Kenny gets his own TV show where he performs disgusting acts. (S4, E15)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The Wacky Molestation Adventure: Kyle has his parents arrested so he can go to a concert but things get out of hand and it's not long before there are no adults left in town! (S4, E16)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: A Very Crappy Christmas: When Mr Hankey fails to show up at Christmas time the boys go looking for him in the sewers. Can the gang revive the spirit of Christmas with their own cartoon? (S4, E17)

programme.title: South Park S4 Ep. 423
programme.desc: 8-year-old contorting quintuplets from Romania defect to the United States and seek shelter with Stan's family.

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: It Hits The Fan: Swearing on a TV show leads to mass profanity in South Park. What does this have to do with The Black Death?! The you-know-what-hits the fan 162 times in this ep! (S5, E01)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cr***le Fight: It's Timmy vs. Jimmy! But does Jimmy know this? The boys are joining the Scouts (troop 69) but their parents aren't so sure when they discover who the Scout Leader is. (S5, E02)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: After the other boys explain to Cartman that pubes don't count unless you grow your own, Cartman realizes he's been tricked by the school bully, Scott Tenorman.

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Terrance and Phillip - Behind The Blow: The boys face death at the hands of some unhinged environmentalists unless they can re-unite Terrance and Phillip for a show at Earth Day Festival! (S5, E05)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Cartmanland: When Cartman inherits $1million and purchases his own theme park, Stan starts to question his faith in God. It's not long before things start to go out of control for Cartman. (S5, E06)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Proper Condom Use: After Cartman and Stan play "red rocket" with their dogs, their parents decide it's time for some school sex education. What the school provides creates worse problems! (S5, E07)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Towelie: Stan's mother buys the boys a console called The Okama Gamesphere but it is stolen whilst they are at school. To get it back they must help a talking towel take on the government! (S5, E08)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Osama Bin Laden Has Farty Pants: The boys send $1 to Afghan children and receive a goat back. When they try to return it an adventure ensues! First episode to air after 9/11. (S5, E09)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: How To Eat With Your Butt: It's school photo time. Kenny decides to play a prank by wearing his parka upside down and revealing his buttocks. Cartman decides to take it a step further. (S5, E10)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Mr. Garrison gets fed up with long lines, delayed flights and the airline industry in general and invents his own transportation device.

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Token is tired of being the only rich kid in town, and succeeds in attracting several other wealthy families to South Park.

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Butters' Very Own Episode: Butters' mum asks him to spy on his dad, however what he discovers leaves Mrs Stoch acting slightly unhinged. Will this be the end of our lil blonde haired buddy? (S5, E14)

programme.title: South Park S5 Ep. 514
programme.desc: Kenny Dies: When Kenny is diagnosed with a terminal illness, Stan takes it especially hard. Will Cartman's truck load of foetuses help with a cure? Or does he have other plans for them... (S5, E13)

programme.title: South Park S6 Ep. 15
programme.desc: When a famous psychic fails to help him exorcise Kenny from his body, Cartman and Chef travel to the moors of Scotland, where Chef's mom tries a little of her voodoo magic on him.

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Jimmy and Timmy pull together a group of people like themselves and call their new club the "Crips."

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 703
programme.desc: Toilet Paper: Mrs. Dreibel gives the boys detention for making a phallus out of clay in art class. Angry, they take revenge by toilet papering her house. Officer Barbrady is on their trail. (S7, E03)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 704
programme.desc: Cancelled: The boys get a sense of deja vu as Cartman again has an anal probe, but they soon realise they're actually stuck in some kind of re-run - Earth is just a reality show for aliens! (S7, E01)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 705
programme.desc: Fat Butt and Pancake Head: When Cartman wins a diversity event with his offensive hand puppet impersonation of Jennifer Lopez, Kyle is enraged. Soon the real J-Lo turns up, mightily peeved! (S7, E05)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 706
programme.desc: Lil' Crime Stoppers: Stan, Kyle, Cartman and Kenny decide to play detective; they go around the town solving minor "crimes" for a dollar. It's not long before they're busting meth labs! (S7, E06)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 707
programme.desc: Red Man's Greed: When the entire town is bought out by a Native American casino, the boys come up with a plan to get their homes back - but is more gambling really the solution? (S7, E07)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 708
programme.desc: South Park is Gay! The TV show Queer Eye For The Straight Guy is sweeping the nation and the men of South Park are embracing metrosexuality, but what evil plan are the hosts plotting? (S7, E08)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 709
programme.desc: Christian Hard Rock: The boys form a band called Moop, but disagree on what direction they should take. Cartman leaves the band and bets them he will have a platinum record first! (S7, E09)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 711
programme.desc: Casa Bonita: Cartman is overjoyed at going to a Mexican restaurant for Kyle's birthday but is crushed when he finds out Butters is invited instead. He'll have to make Butters "disappear". (S7, E11)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 712
programme.desc: All About The Mormons: A new family moves to South Park and their son Gary is an unusually perfect Mormon - this angers the boys no end! Will Stan beat him up or go for a family dinner?! (S7, E12)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 713
programme.desc: Butt Out: When the boys' smoking leads to a nasty incident, it's the cigarettes that are blamed rather than them. Cue the glutinous Rob Reiner to arrive in town with his anti-smoking lobby! (S7, E13)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 714
programme.desc: Raisins: When Wendy breaks up with Stan he takes it hard. The boys decide to take him to the restaurant Raisins, where all of the employees are preteen girls who enjoy wearing heavy make-up. (S7, E14)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The children of South Park are attracted to "Mr. Jefferson," the new neighbor in town, and Cartman goes out of his way to get "Mr. Jefferson" to love him best.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A PETA protest against the use of a cow as South Park Elementary's mascot forces the student body to choose a new one.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: In order to save South Park, Stan and Kyle have to find a way to destroy the ever-expanding Wall-Mart superstore while keeping Cartman from stabbing them in the back.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 801
programme.desc: Good Times With Weapons: After buying martial arts weapons at a local flea market, the boys are transformed into anime Japanese Warriors, with dire consequences for poor Professor Chaos. (S8, E01)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: Up The Down Steroid: Jimmy is due to take part in the Special Olympics but what dodgy substance is he talked into taking? Cartman fakes being disabled so he can enter and win a $1,000. (S8, E02)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: The Passion of the Jew: After seeing 'The Passion of the Christ' a zealous Cartman taunts Kyle. When Stan and Kenny see it, they hate it and harass a crazed Mel Gibson for their money back! (S8, E03)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 805
programme.desc: You Got F'd in the A: The boys get 'served' by some kids from the O.C. so now 'it's on!'. Stan puts together a dance troupe who must compete in the dance-off. Will Randy's moves save them? (S8, E04)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 806
programme.desc: Goobacks: South Park is swamped by workers from the future, who take all the jobs for less pay. The men of South Park go to unusual lengths to stop them. "Dey turk err jurbs!" (S8, E07)

programme.desc: Andy and Sam are shocked to learn that Oliver is the prime suspect in IA’s corruption investigation.

programme.title: Integrity Test
programme.desc: Andy, Dov, Gail, and Nick undertake a risky plan to prove that Commissioner Alonso Santana is corrupt.

programme.title: Ninety Degrees
programme.desc: A heat wave hits and Jarvis opens the division to the public as a cooling station.

programme.title: Breaking Up the Band
programme.desc: Now that Sam and Marlo’s baby girl has arrived, it’s clear nothing could have prepared Andy for this moment.

programme.title: 74 Epiphanies
programme.desc: With the 15 Division restructure looming, Andy and Sam’s wedding lets the gang celebrate one last hurrah.

programme.title: Fresh Paint
programme.desc: A high-stakes takedown goes awry upon the revelation that rookie cop Andy McNally has busted one of her own.

programme.title: Mercury Retrograde
programme.desc: As the other rookies hunt for an escaped convict, Swarek lets Andy in on his past undercover exploits.

programme.title: Fite Nite
programme.desc: The rookie cops duke it out for a cause at “Fite Nite.”

programme.title: Signals Crossed
programme.desc: Andy trades in her uniform for something more risqué when she goes undercover as a prostitute.

programme.title: Broad Daylight
programme.desc: During a home invasion, Andy is left alone and confronted with a hiding thief who is armed and very volatile.

programme.title: Bullet Proof
programme.desc: A fatal traffic collision reveals a shocking truth, and Andy’s romance with Det. Callaghan gets complicated.

programme.title: Hot & Bothered
programme.desc: A heat wave has wreaked havoc on the city, multiplied by growing fears of a serial rapist on the loose.

programme.title: Honour Roll
programme.desc: Andy and Chris investigate a nightclub beating, but all clues point to a cop.

programme.title: Girlfriend of the Year
programme.desc: At a highway accident, Chris and Gail stumble upon a car that has a license plate matched to an Amber Alert.

programme.title: Big Nickel
programme.desc: A botched prisoner transport has Andy and Swarek in a cat-and-mouse game to catch the fugitive.

programme.title: To Serve or Protect
programme.desc: Andy’s ex-cop father has confessed that he may have committed a crime during an alcohol-induced blackout.

programme.title: Judgment Day
programme.desc: It’s time for performance assessments for the rookies as they find out the fate of their careers.

programme.title: Takedown
programme.desc: When an arrest compromises a drug bust, Andy steps up to salvage the bust by going undercover with Swarek.

programme.title: Butterflies
programme.desc: Andy's world explodes when a student is killed in a shooting, and a bullet hits Andy, lodging in her vest.

programme.title: Might Have Been
programme.desc: Andy and Gail go undercover as cocktail waitresses to clean up a drug-infested club.

programme.title: Bad Moon Rising
programme.desc: As a full moon hangs over the city, the rookies are unnerved by a series of strange occurrences.

programme.title: Heart & Sparks
programme.desc: As 15 Division recovers from the shooting of Callaghan, a series of arsons culminates in a laundromat fire.

programme.title: Stung
programme.desc: Using a car dealership, 15 Division runs a sting operation to crack down on suspects with outstanding warrants

programme.title: Just the Beginning
programme.desc: An accident puts Shane’s wedding in jeopardy. Heartland Beef faces an uncertain future.

programme.title: There and Back Again
programme.desc: Amy returns from Europe and struggles to adjust to life at Heartland and her relationship with Ty.

programme.title: The Big Red Wall
programme.desc: After Jack makes a major announcement, Lou plans a party and forces Jack into an awkward reunion.

programme.title: Severed Ties
programme.desc: Amy’s attempts to reunite with Georgie are continually thwarted by the arrival of lavish gifts from afar.

programme.title: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: A surprise visitor arrives at Heartland and makes a declaration that has serious consequences for Amy.

programme.title: Endings and Beginnings
programme.desc: Amy struggles to turn a pair of horses into a team, and is forced to go head-to-head with a rival trainer.

programme.title: Steal Away
programme.desc: When a client horse keeps escaping, Amy discovers the animal has unexpected abilities.

programme.title: Walk a Mile
programme.desc: Amy struggles to help a Hutterite family whose team of Percherons ran amok during a hayride.

programme.title: The Family Tree
programme.desc: A school project opens a door to Georgie’s past that could ultimately change her life at Heartland.

programme.title: The Pike River Cull
programme.desc: Jack and Amy help an old friend when a herd of wild horses faces the threat of being destroyed.

programme.title: The Heart of a River
programme.desc: With the fate of the wild horses hanging in the balance, Amy and Ty find themselves drawing closer.

programme.title: The Silent Partner
programme.desc: Amy finds herself in a difficult position when a client reveals that Peter turned down a lucrative job offer.

programme.title: Broken Heartland
programme.desc: When Amy is invited to do a horse clinic in Montana, she and Ty decide to take a road trip together.

programme.title: Cowgirls Don’t Cry
programme.desc: Tim opens a rodeo school, determined to help young people avoid injury while getting the training they need.

programme.title: Riders on the Storm
programme.desc: Amy and Ty help Scott’s nephew realize he is worthy of continuing his family tradition of relay racing.

programme.title: Eclipse of the Heart
programme.desc: Lou returns from Vancouver with an admission that threatens to change the Heartland family forever.

programme.title: Faking It
programme.desc: The family strives to support a devastated Georgie when Lou and Peter are forced to tell her distressing news.

programme.title: All I Need Is You
programme.desc: Lou spearheads preparations for the big day while Amy throws herself into gentling a rescue horse.

programme.title: Written in Stone
programme.desc: To give Amy and Ty the wedding they really want, Lou struggles to deal with a slew of last minute hurdles

programme.title: Brave New World
programme.desc: While a dangerous bear lurks near Heartland, Amy and Georgie rescue an injured horse from the woods

programme.title: Begin Again
programme.desc: Ty prepares to celebrate an important milestone as he and Amy treat an abandoned horse.

programme.title: Riding for a Fall
programme.desc: Georgie gets pulled away by Lou and Peter who insist she focus on her schoolwork.

programme.title: Ties of the Earth
programme.desc: Jack grapples with the impending loss of a loyal and trusted friend.

programme.title: Back in the Saddle
programme.desc: Georgie guilts Jack into helping her train on a new horse in the hopes he will fall in love with the animal.

programme.title: Over and Out
programme.desc: Ty and Amy’s attempt to rescue an injured eagle in the mountains takes a dangerous turn.

programme.title: Fearless
programme.desc: Amy helps a Medieval jouster who was badly injured during a competition regain his confidence.

programme.title: Reckless Abandon
programme.desc: Amy’s attempts to help Georgie deal with an impending departure are complicated by Olivia.

programme.title: A Matter of Trust
programme.desc: Amy and Ty work together to determine why Caleb’s horse becomes ill during his treatment at Heartland.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A pair of newlyweds stopping in a small town are trapped by their own superstition when playing a fortune-telling machine in a local diner.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The daughter of an inventor objects to their 'perfect' home where they are waited on by mechanical servants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: A nostalgic actor revisits his late wife and friends at their old haunt, only to find that he is now out of place there.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: When three dum-dum crooks get ahold of a camera that takes pictures of the future, they set out to make a quick fortune with their new toy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: After a derelict Santa Claus is fired on Christmas Eve, he finds a mysterious bag that gives out presents. With this bag, he sets out to fulfill his one wish - to see the less fortunate inherit the bounties of Christmas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In a tragic, western town, a desperate father begs for clemency as his son is slated to die for an accident he could not have prevented.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: At a prominent club in Washington, D.C., a socialite argues about whether it would be possible to change history by traveling back in time. When he leaves the club he finds himself in 1865, on the night that President Lincoln will be shot.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: A used car salesman buys a car that dooms him to tell only the truth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: When a woman investigates a clamor on the roof of her rural house, she discovers a small UFO and little aliens emerging from it. Or so it seems.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Gaining telepathic abilities when his coin lands on its edge bank clerk Hector B. Poole learns about the difference between other people's plans and fantasies.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: While in the hospital recovering from overwork, Liz Powell keeps dreaming about going down to the hospital morgue.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Passing through the sound barrier a commercial airliner inadvertently travels back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 19
programme.desc: A timid vacuum-cleaner salesman is given the strength of 300 men by some experimenting aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 20
programme.desc: An old radio is taking bitter bachelor Ed Lindsay back to a happier time before what he considers worthless tripe on television when he starts picking up radio programs from the 1930's and 1940's.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 21
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler cajoles his friend to use his telekinesis to affect the results of the gambling tables in Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 22
programme.desc: A toy telephone becomes the link between a young boy and his dead grandmother.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 23
programme.desc: A pioneer from a wagon train in 1847 sets off to find something for his ill son and stumbles into present-day New Mexico.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 24
programme.desc: After successfully stealing a gold shipment, a group of criminals and their scientist accomplice put themselves in suspended animation in a remote desert cave. When they awaken decades later, complications ensue when their truck is destroyed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 25
programme.desc: Annoyed by a club member's constant chatter, a man bets him he cannot remain silent for a year, living in a glass enclosure in the club basement.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 26
programme.desc: Adam Grant is trapped in a recurring nightmare, in which he is sentenced to death and executed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 27
programme.desc: Using the power of mind over matter, Archibald Beechcroft remakes the world to his own specifications.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 28
programme.desc: Following a frantic phone call about a crashed spaceship, two policemen try and determine who among the passengers of a bus at a snowed-in roadside diner is from another world.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S2 Ep. 29
programme.desc: In a future totalitarian society, a librarian is declared obsolete and sentenced to death.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A man and a woman, on opposite sides of a future war, encounter each other in a deserted town.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: A plane lands safely, but the pilot, crew and all of its passengers are missing!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When a nuclear attack appears imminent, several suburban friends and neighbors fight over control of a single bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: On the road home from the Civil War, a Confederate soldier stops at a burned-out house and gets to know the owner, a recent widow.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Championship pool player Fats Brown returns from the grave for one last game.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: After a poor but ambitious Central American farm worker overthrows his country's tyrannical leader, he believes he sees assassins everywhere. A look in the mirror reveals his most dangerous enemy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Before he died, notorious gunslinger Pinto Sykes put a curse on hired-gun Conny Miller. Miller returns to town and is challenged to visit the grave of Sykes, despite the curse.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Little Anthony Fremont controls an entire town with his ability to read minds and make people do as he wishes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: A former Nazi SS Captain returns to the ruins of a concentration camp to reminisce and is met by one of his victims.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The Earth's orbit has been changed, drawing ever closer to the sun and promising imminent destruction.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Confederacy scout Sgt. Joseph Paradine finds a town full of Union soldiers, and an old man who claims he used witchcraft to paralyze them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Alan Richards plans to build a dam in Africa on a tribe's ancestral land. The tribe's witch doctor puts a curse on him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Woodrow, a janitor living in the year 1890, accidentally activates a time traveling helmet which transports him to 1962 - then promptly breaks down.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: A hobo, clown, bagpipe player, ballerina and military officer are trapped in a huge cylinder.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: A gung-ho young soldier gets a new viewpoint on war when he inexplicably changes places with a Japanese officer trying to stop his superior from leading a charge against American forces.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 16
programme.desc: A lonely old woman refuses to leave her apartment for fear of meeting "Mr. Death."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Paul Radin has invited three people to join him in his bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 18
programme.desc: A vagrant steps into a murdered gangster's expensive shoes and is taken over by the dead man's ghost, who vows to remain on Earth to seek revenge against his killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 19
programme.desc: On a hunting trip, Hyder Simpson and his dog Rip dive into a lake after a raccoon. When he gets home he finds that no one can see or hear him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Actor Rance McGrew makes TV Westerns for a living, but he's a lousy actor and a worse cowboy. Despite that, each week he "wins" against the bad guys. Finally, the bad guys have had enough and decide to teach McGrew a lesson.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 21
programme.desc: The senior residents of Sunnyvale decide that the secret to youth is acting young, and in particular playing a childhood game called "kick-the-can."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Fortune discovers that a piano he bought his wife for her birthday has magical properties - the music that it plays makes people reveal their true essence.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 23
programme.desc: Jeff Myrtlebank comes back to life at his own funeral and soon begins to act very strangely...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone S3 Ep. 24
programme.desc: The Kanamits, 9-foot tall aliens, arrive on Earth with one lofty goal: To Serve Man.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: A visiting surgeon must deal with his alcoholism after a fellow doctor is murdered during one of his blackouts.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: When a photoshop erroneously sends Dr. Sloan the wrong set of photographs, he becomes embroiled in the murder investigation of an escort girl. Meanwhile, Amanda's baby is about to come to term.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: In an episode reminiscent of Hitchcock's Strangers on a Train, Dr. Sloan is drawn into a murder pact by a psychiatrist in need of money. The psychiatrist kills a woman pestering Dr. Sloan, expecting Mark to eliminate his problem.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Jesse is attracted to a beautiful psychic, who also happens to be the prime suspect in a murder. Amanda copes with the trials of motherhood.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The daughter of one of Mark's friends writes a juicy tell-all expose of the most prominent public figures. Mark takes her in after a crazed stalker starts threatening her and her co-authors.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Mark investigates a perky morning television personality for the murder of a Howard Stern-like radio host.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan is the executor of his friend, Preston Michael's, estate after Michaels is found in the body of a shark.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A friendly-fire incident involving a veteran cop leaves Steve's friend dead, but the shooting only appears to be unintentional.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Jesse and Dr. Sloan have contact with a contagious victim of a genetically altered smallpox strain.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A skater stages an attack on herself to win endorsements, then ices her accomplice---and frames her rival for the killing.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Soft music, candles, and a lifeless body dressed in lovely lingerie. These are the trademarks of 'The Casanova Killer,' a serial murderer who leaves only a stain of blood near the heart, and the sole of a foot marred by an 'X,' as forensic evidence.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Soft music, candles, and a lifeless body dressed in lovely lingerie. These are the trademarks of 'The Casanova Killer,' a serial murderer who leaves only a stain of blood near the heart, and the sole of a foot marred by an 'X,' as forensic evidence.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan and Steve investigate a private eye's murder in the not-very-pretty world of modeling.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A cardiologist and two business partners plot a deadly insurance scam.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A terrorist bombing ignites an undercover investigation involving an ambitious cop.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan finds a murder victim among the trauma patients from a major bus accident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: A senator's drug-addicted daughter is killed during an altercation with her father, but a senior aide covers up the incident as an overdose.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan and a headstrong attorney (Piper Laurie) investigate a drive-by shooting at a high school.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan's daughter (Stacy Van Dyke) escapes from her abusive husband---a trucker who turns up murdered.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The head pediatric nurse is an ex-prostitute whose former madam is murdered after revealing that she's going to publish a tell-all book.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan searches for clues to solve the decades-old murder of his mentor at the hospital.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan recruits his friend Ben Matlock (Andy Griffith) to defend Jesse, who's accused of the murder of a resident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Conclusion. With Jesse falsely accused, Ben Matlock (Andy Griffith) pieces together the evidence to find the real killer of Eric Spindler.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Mike Connors reprises his former role as tough-guy PI Joe Mannix, who gets assistance from Dr. Sloan to tackle an unsolved 1973 murder case.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 18
programme.desc: The investigation of a country star's murder revolves around a driven TV producer (Barbara Mandrell) and her daughter, a timid songwriter.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 19
programme.desc: A psychiatrist murders his estranged wife and frames a patient for the crime.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The women are mentored by America's Next Top Model All-Star winner Lisa D' Amato as they are divided into teams to create and record music videos.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The models are tasked with creating a PSA with some young girls for an anti-bullying campaign, where the winners of the challenge will receive a personal video message from a loved one.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The models go to castings for the opportunity to open a fashion show for one of the Dorchester Collection Fashion Prize finalists with fashion's elite.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The final six women head to Macau, where they get a reading from an astrologer and are challenged with re-creating their auras through fashion and beauty.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 10

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 11
programme.desc: The models make their way through Hong Kong to attend go-sees, where one of the women loses her confidence and crumbles under the pressure.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The final models participate in their Covergirl commercial and photo shoot, where one of the women has a panic attack and is taken to the hospital.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S18 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Rewind and review the challenges, photo shoots and dramatic personalities that make up the British Invasion cycle of Top Model.

programme.desc: A hi-tech runway analyzes the girls’ strut & Tyra, Miss J and Jay Manuel assess which 14 show the most Top Model potential.

programme.title: Australia's Next Top Model S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Australia's Next Top Model chronicles the transformation of everyday young women into potentially fierce supermodels. The participants live together and compete for a multi-faceted Grand Prize package

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 46
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia is about to get even bigger as the competition travels to the land of the cherry blossom, Japan. Contestants must explore Tokyo to find ingredients for the mystery box challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 47
programme.desc: Each of the eight contestants will have to conceive, cook and deliver one course as part of an eight-course Kappo-style degustation for some of Tokyo's food elite.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 48
programme.desc: The winning contestants from the invention test and the Kappo challenge now have a chance to fight it out for immunity in view of Mount Fuji at the Obuchi Tea Plantation.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 49
programme.desc: The judges welcome contestants to the heart of Shinjuku, where Tokyo comes alive at night. Contestants will be cooking at a local alleyway packed with street stalls to feed hundreds of hungry diners.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 50
programme.desc: The losing team from the Yokocho street stall challenge must cook off to stay in the competition. Contestants must cook a dish that celebrates where they have come from and where they are going.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 51
programme.desc: Contestants have an hour to create a dish from four mystery ingredients to gain advantage in the invention test. Later, contestants must recreate a classic dish and avoid facing elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 52
programme.desc: The three least impressive contestants from the invention test cook off in a pressure test set by MasterChef Alumni, Kylie Millar. Who has cooked their last dish in the MasterChef Australia kitchen?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 53
programme.desc: The three best invention test performers now face a special souffle immunity challenge. Can our amateur chef out-cook a professional and find themselves cooking in finals week?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 54
programme.desc: The judges reveal that each contestant will be in charge of either an entree, main or dessert to serve 50 hungry customers. The bottom three contestants will then be up for elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 55
programme.desc: The three least impressive contestants from the service challenge must cook to stay in the competition and earn their place in finals week. Who will be the next to leave MasterChef Australia?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 56
programme.desc: It's Finals Week in the MasterChef Australia kitchen! The top six contestants enter the kitchen to face a mystery box challenge to prove to the judges just how far they have come in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 57
programme.desc: The bottom three contestants from the invention test now cook off in a pressure test to avoid elimination. Who will be the next to leave the competition?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 58
programme.desc: The top five contestants must create either a sweet or savoury dish and present seven plates of food for the judges as well as four of Australia's top chefs to avoid elimination from the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 59
programme.desc: The pressure is on as the top four contestants enter one of Melbourne's top restaurants, Dinner By Heston, for a service challenge. Who will be the first semi-finalist?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 60
programme.desc: Three contestants must create a dish worthy of a place in the semi-final. Later, Curtis Stone drops by to take part in an invention test relay.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 61
programme.desc: The stakes are high as the three remaining MasterChef Australia contestants fight it out for the two places in the finale and the chance of winning the coveted prize.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 62
programme.desc: Who will be crowned the winner of MasterChef Australia 2017? The finalists are competing for a $250,000 cash prize & a column in Australia's leading premium food magazine, Delicious.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S9 Ep. 63
programme.desc: Who will be crowned the winner of MasterChef Australia 2017? The finalists are competing for a $250,000 cash prize & a column in Australia's leading premium food magazine, Delicious.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Your favourites are back for another crack at the coveted MasterChef title. Up for grabs tonight is this season's only immunity pin and joining them all week is chef extraordinaire, Gordon Ramsay.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Each team must cook a three-course meal for 120 guests. The judges reveal three ingredients: black garlic, ginger and potatoes. Each team must feature one of the ingredients in each course.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Teams must cook a three-course meal in a relay style cook. Each team member starts a course and after 20 minutes must swap to the next course. The most cohesive menu with the best dishes wins.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 23
programme.desc: Emotions are running high now that the castaways are getting closer to the finale. The tribemates are starting to second guess their strategies. Is now the time to change it up?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 24
programme.desc: With only five contestants remaining, strategy reaches fever pitch as each tribemate ponders who should be the next to go.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 25
programme.desc: Only four contestants remain and the next move they make will determine the finalists. The penultimate Immunity Challenge is one that each tribemate feels confident they can win.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S1 Ep. 26
programme.desc: With only 3 castaways left remaining, who will win the half a million dollar prize and the title of sole survivor?

programme.title: Survivor US S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Sixteen real-life Americans are stranded in the middle of one of the most unforgiving places on earth – the Australian Outback.

programme.title: Survivor US S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: As they continue to adapt to their new life in the outback, Okagor begins to suspect one of their own. A second survivor is voted out.

programme.title: Survivor US S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: False promises and sincere commitments dominate the conversations in the Outback.

programme.title: Survivor US S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: An out-of-control wild fire threatens the camp of one of the tribes.

programme.title: Survivor US S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Irritated and annoyed, the tribe members battle exhaustion and hunger.

programme.title: Survivor US S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: A stunning turn of events leaves the tribes in emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Survivor US S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The 10 remaining survivors merge into one tribe.

programme.title: Survivor US S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Individuals begin to rethink their strategy as the newly formed tribe forges on as one group.

programme.title: Survivor US S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: One hour of highlights and never-before-seen footage that will recap the survivors' first 24 days in the Australian Outback.

programme.title: Survivor US S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Heavy storms and lack of rations test the capabilities and spirit of the survivors.

programme.title: Survivor US S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: The Barramundi tribe faces hard -- and very wet -- times, on SURVIVOR.

programme.title: Survivor US S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Mother Nature flexes her muscles in the Outback. It’s Day 32 and the survivors are being pounded by torrential rains.

programme.title: Survivor US S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Despite their bad fortune, the survivors' spirits are lifted by the reward challenge.

programme.title: Survivor US S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Now that the $1 million prize is within reach, the stakes are at an all-time high for the final four survivors.

programme.title: Survivor US S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Having endured bush fires, floods, extreme temperatures, starvation, and Outback politics for 42 days, the winner will finally be revealed on this 2 hr. special.

programme.title: Survivor US S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Immediately following the finale, Bryant Gumbel will host a LIVE gathering of the 16 survivors who will be reunited for the first time since being in the Outback.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: 24 Australians arrive on the tropical island of Samoa ready to outwit, outplay and outlast each other in order to win the half a million dollar prize and the title of sole survivor.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The perfect storm is brewing in Samoa as the tribes fight to protect supplies & maintain fire in adverse conditions. However, how will the prospect of a idol at play tamper with new friendships?
